query:
now on 468: Fix Summary:                                                                                                                                                       
  - Root cause: get_cycle_start_goal used ORDER BY timestamp DESC — a later NULL-goal cycle_start row shadowed the original goal                                     
  - Fix: AND goal IS NOT NULL + ORDER BY timestamp ASC, seq ASC LIMIT 1 (two-part, inseparable)                                                                      
  - Files changed: crates/unimatrix-store/src/db.rs, crates/unimatrix-store/tests/migration_v15_to_v16.rs
  - New tests: test_goal_correction_first_written_goal_is_preserved (renamed+flipped), test_multi_session_null_start_preserves_original_goal                         
  - All tests passing: 4262 unit + 22/22 smoke + 41 lifecycle     \
sec review: no findings

entries.title: Bug fix verification: audit fire-and-forget async pattern — test strategy
get_cycle_start_goal ORDER BY DESC silently shadows original goal when second cycle_start has NULL goal
When changing query semantics, split the existing semantics test rather than updating it in place
